subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is all dominion and creation; He giveth life and causeth death, and He is the Ever-Living Who dieth not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهدالله انه لا اله الا هو له الامر و الخلق یحیی و یمیت و هو حی لا یموت و فی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
